title: The Memory Problem, Baseten | Compile 26
summary: Baseten's research addresses memory constraints in long-horizon agents through KV cache compression and iterative compaction. The approach enables near-lossless retrieval of relevant context at inference time, with the compacted cache functioning as an MLP layer.
writeup: Baseten presents research on the memory constraints that limit long-horizon agents, framing the work around KV cache compression and iterative compaction. The method aims for near-lossless retrieval of relevant context at inference time, with the compacted cache operating as an MLP layer. Related concepts touched include test-time compute, sparse attention, and long-context reasoning.
